allow: Bash(curl -s "https://resume-cv.framer.website/" -L --max-time 30 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")

Bash(curl -s https://resume-cv.framer.website/ -L --max-time 30 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8")
Bash(curl -v "https://resume-cv.framer.website/" --max-time 30 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36")

Bash(curl -s https://resume-cv.framer.website/ -L --max-time 30 --ssl-no-revoke -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")

Bash(curl -s --tlsv1.2 -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://resume-cv.framer.website/" -o /tmp/framer_page.html)
